name: Acid Splash
description: You create a bubbling glob of acid and hurl it. Choose one or two creatures you can see within range. If you choose two, they must be within 5 feet of each other. A target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 Acid damage. This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).
